card.name: ANCIENT RUINS
card.description: Remnants of ancient ruins rise from the sand; it is hard to tell from which age they date.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: CAGE
card.description: The bones of a prisoner lie inside the cage; you do not know whether time or the fierce heat claimed him.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: COBBLED ROAD
card.description: A cobbled path stretches before you, as if it once belonged to the streets of a forgotten city.
card.rules: Roads will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: CORNER I
card.description: The path suddenly turns and the vast desert seems endless to you.
card.rules: Corners will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: CORNER II
card.description: The path suddenly turns and the vast desert seems endless to you.
card.rules: Corners will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: DESERT DUNES
card.description: The desert dunes become firmer than usual; a small rocky patch rises above the sand.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: FOUNTAIN OF LIFE
card.description: Among the desert dunes, beside some ruins, you find the coveted Fountain of Life, from which the sacred waters of Khemri flow.
card.rules: See the Adventure Book for details about this room.

card.name: MAGIC SEAL
card.description: This room is flooded with supreme magical power. Not everyone is capable of surviving it.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: MALEVOLENT RITUAL
card.description: Candles arranged in a circle surround a mystic symbol. A bad omen comes over you as you reach this room.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: OASIS
card.description: A small oasis in the middle of nowhere offers the party a little peace and rest.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: PIT OF DEATH
card.description: Amid your exploits you come upon a water-filled pit. It seems like a good moment to rest.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: ROCKY STAIRWAY
card.description: A stone stairway lifts you up along the path. From it, you can glimpse part of the desert.
card.rules: Stairs will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: ROUTE
card.description: A dune track lies before you; every step sinks deep and the sand-laden wind blinds you.
card.rules: Passageways will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: RUINED HOUSE
card.description: The ruins of a small house that was destroyed have been overrun by the monsters of the area.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: STAIR
card.description: The ground hardens and, among the dunes, you find a kind of stair hidden in the desert.
card.rules: Stairs will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: T-JUNCTION I
card.description: The path forks and you do not know which direction to choose; the heat bears down and your supplies are running short.
card.rules: Junctions will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: T-JUNCTION II
card.description: The path forks and you do not know which direction to choose; the heat bears down and your supplies are running short.
card.rules: Junctions will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: TORTURED PRISONERS
card.description: Beside a small grate in the centre lie two chained bodies, consumed by the passage of time.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: TURNING PASSAGE I
card.description: The path bends and the sandy wind blinds you. Every step becomes more uncertain.
card.rules: Passageways will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: TURNING PASSAGE II
card.description: The path bends and the sandy wind blinds you. Every step becomes more uncertain.
card.rules: Passageways will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: VALLEY OF BONES
card.description: Suddenly the ground hardens and, among the dunes, a graveyard of bones from an immense creature of ages past emerges.
card.rules: See the Adventure Book for details about this room.

card.name: X-JUNCTION I
card.description: A junction opens into four possible directions to take.
card.rules: Junctions will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: X-JUNCTION II
card.description: A junction appears on your route, offering new directions to take.
card.rules: Junctions will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: ALTAR OF THE FALLEN
card.description: After climbing the steps, you find a raised walkway with water on either side.
card.rules: See the Adventure Book for details about this room.

card.name: CHAMBER OF DUSK
card.description: The chamber of dusk, the end of times where everything ends, also known as the deathly hall.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: CHAMBER OF PUNISHMENT
card.description: An empty room, barely lit, with paving stones worn down by the passage of time.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: CHAMBER OF REBIRTH
card.description: The adventurers feel their Wounds mending; the tiles shine and fill those who step into the chamber with courage.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: CHAMBER OF SCARABS
card.description: Walls of skulls form the vaulted chamber, with a great emblem engraved on the floor.
card.rules: See the Adventure Book for details about this room.

card.name: CORNER III
card.description: Without knowing what lies ahead, the corridor turns and forces you deeper into the dungeon.
card.rules: Corners will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: CORNER IV
card.description: The corridor turns sharply and you have no idea what lies in the depths of the dungeon.
card.rules: Corners will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: CORRIDOR I
card.description: Brightly coloured tiles form a straight corridor. They look almost new, which suggests very few people have reached this place.
card.rules: Roads will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: CORRIDOR II
card.description: A faint corridor lit by torches fixed to the walls.
card.rules: Passageways will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: HALL OF THE IDOL
card.description: A huge carving of a scorpion lies on the floor, with a skull in each corner.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: QUEEN'S CHAMBERS
card.description: A long chamber lined with columns and, at the far end, a great throne flanked by a banner on each side.
card.rules: See the Adventure Book for details about this room.

card.name: SETTRA'S SARCOPHAGUS
card.description: A mummified body rests atop a small altar surrounded by skulls and burning candles.
card.rules: See the Adventure Book for details about this room.

card.name: STAIRS I
card.description: Stairs made of ancient tiles, still gleaming despite the passing of the years.
card.rules: Stairs will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: STAIRS II
card.description: Stairs made of ancient tiles, still gleaming despite the passing of the years.
card.rules: Stairs will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: T-JUNCTION III
card.description: The path forks and you do not know which direction to choose; the heat bears down and your supplies are running short.
card.rules: Junctions will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: T-JUNCTION IV
card.description: The corridor splits and you do not know which direction to choose; whichever path you take, you sense nothing good ahead.
card.rules: Junctions will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: THE HERALD'S PASSAGE
card.description: The passage crosses a narrow chamber with two enormous statues at its entrance.
card.rules: See the Adventure Book for details about this section.

card.name: TURNING PASSAGE III
card.description: The corridor bends, but the darkness keeps you from seeing what lies ahead.
card.rules: Passageways will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: TURNING PASSAGE IV
card.description: The corridor bends, yet the darkness prevents you from seeing what lies ahead.
card.rules: Passageways will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: X-JUNCTION III
card.description: A junction appears in the dungeon, with new directions to take.
card.rules: Junctions will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: X-JUNCTION IV
card.description: A junction appears in the dungeon, with new directions to take.
card.rules: Junctions will always be empty unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: ALLEYWAY
card.description: As if the townsfolk had fled in great haste, broken crates on the ground and shattered cobblestones lead you into an alleyway.
card.rules: A Corridor will always be empty, unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: BACK GARDEN
card.description: A garden rest area seems to offer the group a brief moment of respite.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: BROKEN ROAD
card.description: There is a pit in the middle of the road, though someone has laid some old planks across it to pass.
card.rules: A Corridor will always be empty, unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: CORNER
card.description: The streets of the city turn at your path. No one remains, yet everything is full of closed coffins.
card.rules: A Corridor will always be empty, unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: EAST DISTRICT
card.description: In this district there is a bloodstained column in the centre, and a large crate.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: ENTRANCE
card.description: An access point to the city that serves as a crossroads of streets. So much silence is deeply unsettling.
card.rules: A Corridor will always be empty, unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: GRAVEYARD
card.description: The city's necropolis, where all the townsfolk and villagers who died were laid to rest.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: GREEN ZONE
card.description: A leafy tree fills the room, offering some shade all around it. Ideal for a brief pause.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: MONUMENT
card.description: In the centre of the plaza, an immense monument rises. It seems especially strange when the moonlight reflects on it.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: OLD TOWN
card.description: The city centre lies abandoned. As you arrive, you sense a kind of magical aura surrounding the place. Everything is in ruins after the siege.
card.rules: For details about this room, consult the Adventure Book.

card.name: PIT OF CORPSES
card.description: There is a small water fountain beside a nauseating smell coming from a pit filled with skulls and bones.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: SEWER GRATE
card.description: Beneath the great grate, water runs, falls, and splashes everywhere. It might be an escape route.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: SHORT STREET
card.description: A narrow, short street where the cobblestones have been worn down by the passage of time.
card.rules: A Corridor will always be empty, unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: SHORT STREET II
card.description: The city's sewer system bears an engraved emblem you do not recognize at all.
card.rules: A Corridor will always be empty, unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: STREET CROSSING
card.description: An intersection where the streets continue endlessly between tall ruined buildings. The city has a grim, gothic character.
card.rules: A Corridor will always be empty, unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: TOPPLED STATUE
card.description: A gigantic stone idol has been cast down and shattered into hundreds of pieces.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.

card.name: WILL-O'-THE-WISPS
card.description: At this spot, four ghostly lights illuminate the citadel with an intense blue glow.
card.rules: A Corridor will always be empty, unless the Adventure Book states otherwise or an Unexpected Event occurs during the Power Phase.

card.name: WISHING WELL
card.description: The bottom of the well cannot be seen, and even shouting into it brings back an echo. There are traces of fresh blood near the dark well.
card.rules: Upon entering a Dungeon Room, draw an Event Card unless the Adventure Book states otherwise.
